media.title: Templates & Assets
media.limitFree: Free limit reached (3 images). Upgrade to PRO for more storage!
media.limitPro: Media limit reached (10 images for PRO).

model.title: AI Models
model.textBestDesc: Highest quality and brand coherence. On FREE it is limited to 2 daily uses; PRO unlocks the full flow.
model.textFreeDesc: Fast and flexible for iterating ideas without configuration. Great for drafts and variations.
model.visualBestDescFree: More premium look. On FREE: 5 new images and 2 modifications per day.
model.visualBestDescPro: More premium look for final assets and consistency. PRO keeps the flow unblocked.
model.visualFreeDesc: Fast for visual exploration and concepts. Perfect for trying styles and variants.
model.glmHint: FREE: Instant Best (Text) allows 2 daily uses. Use the adaptive model to keep going.
model.seedreamHint: Instant Best (Visual): 5 new images and 2 modifications per day.
model.glmLimitMessage: On FREE you can use Instant Best (Text) 2 times per day. Switch to the adaptive model or upgrade to PRO.
model.seedreamNewLimitMessage: Instant Best (Visual) allows 5 new images per day. Switch to the adaptive model to continue.
model.seedreamEditLimitMessage: Instant Best (Visual) allows 2 modifications per day. Switch to the adaptive model or use PRO.

publish.title: Ready to publish
publish.message: We saved this post in your local queue. Next step is connecting real destinations and automations.

au.title: Export (waiting)
au.message: This integration is on hold. Once you share the AU flow MD, we will wire it with one click.

pro.ctaWithBenefits: Upgrade to PRO for greater access in OpenContent IDE

modal.title: Unlock PRO
modal.subtitle: With PRO you get more power to create, publish, and scale your content.
modal.benefitModels: More freedom and better model quality
modal.benefitLimits: More iterations and higher limits to keep your flow unblocked
modal.benefitWorkflow: Faster workflows: create, iterate, export, publish
modal.benefitProfile: Advanced profile and brand settings for teams
modal.noteRedirect: We will take you to opencontent.ide to complete purchase and activate PRO on your account.

paywall.defaultMessage: This feature requires a PRO plan.
paywall.dailyGenerationsMessage: You reached your daily generation limit. Upgrade to PRO to keep creating without friction.
paywall.iterationsMessage: This project already reached the max iterations for your current plan.
paywall.dailyImagesMessage: You consumed your daily images. PRO gives you more visual generation capacity.
paywall.dailyExportsMessage: You used all daily exports on FREE. Upgrade to PRO to export with practical no limits.
paywall.dailyPublishesMessage: You reached your daily publish limit. PRO lets you publish more content.
paywall.projectsMessage: Your FREE plan reached the max projects. Upgrade to PRO to continue creating without deleting history.
